ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., forward, guard) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Annual salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was held */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team in the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "field_goals" TEXT /* Field goals made (in format made-attempted) */,
  "three_pointers" TEXT /* Three-point field goals made (in format made-attempted) */,
  "free_throws" TEXT /* Free throws made (in format made-attempted) */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds (offensive + defensive) */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus statistic indicating the point differential while the player is on the court */,
  "fast_break_points" INTEGER /* Fast break points scored by the player */,
  "points_in_paint" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the paint */,
  "second_chance_points" INTEGER /* Second chance points scored by the player */,
  "bench_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player off the bench */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Player) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Chosen username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., healing, out) */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return date for the player */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who attended the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the training session occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "focus" TEXT /* Focus area of the training session (e.g., shooting, defense) */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Intensity level of the training session (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_wearables" (
  "wearable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wearable record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who wore the device */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the player */,
  "fatigue_level" INTEGER /* Fatigue level of the player (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wearable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_wearables_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the play was made */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., pass, shot, dribble) */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_plays_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Points allowed by the team */,
  "field_goal_percentage" TEXT /* Field goal percentage of the team */,
  "three_point_percentage" TEXT /* Three-point percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
